productDisplayName: Catwalk Women Ballerina Grey Casual Shoe
description: These synthetic leather Mary Janes from catwalk come with a twist of patent leather on the toe and heel cup making for a perfect addition to your wardrobe. Upper Synthetic leather upper with perforations for comfort and breathability Patent leather overlaps on the toe and heel cup for enhanced durability Velcro strap for a customised Fit Fabric lining for added comfort Removable footbed to accomodate an orthotic Outsole TPU outsole with multi-directional lugs for enhanced grip and traction Sandal Care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
